summary: Added a dedicated runtime adapter roadmap HTML explaining how Datalox can later integrate with Docker, CyberGym, E2B, Modal, OpenClaw, and internal runners without becoming a sandbox runtime.

agentTurn.assistant_summary: Created docs/runtime-adapter-roadmap.html. The roadmap keeps the boundary explicit: external runtimes own containers, services, filesystem state, browsers, verifiers, and compute scheduling; Datalox owns runtime lifecycle hooks, tool-I/O capture, replay bundles, fixture activation, and grounded exports. It defines a runtime adapter interface, spec files, command shapes, phases, CyberGym positioning, non-goals, and immediate repo work. Linked the roadmap from docs/project-overview.md and docs/local-to-server-engine-plan.html, and added it to the active replay-doc scan.

tool_calls.output_summary: Active replay docs gate passed: 1 file, 7 tests.

Replay docs tests passed, but repo identity tests failed because legacy pack artifacts and marker blocks were already regenerated in AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, .claude/hooks, old host rules, agent-wiki, old promotion scripts, and old pack skill paths.

file_changes.diff_summary: New roadmap for future runtime adapter integration. Includes layer split, adapter contract, spec files, commands, phases, CyberGym positioning, non-goals, and immediate repo work.
Linked runtime-adapter-roadmap.html from the project overview.
Linked runtime-adapter-roadmap.html and added Phase 8.5 for optional runtime adapter SPI work after fixture replay and fixture sets.
Added runtime-adapter-roadmap.html to the active replay surface scan.
